title: MakeMyTrip is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: MakeMyTrip is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? MakeMyTrip in Meerut offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About MakeMyTrip:
MakeMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip!
